core_behavior: The checkout flow shall be implemented as a linear, progressive multi-step process with a maximum of 4 steps: Cart Review → Contact & Shipping → Payment → Order Confirmation.
Steps shall be presented as a persistent progress indicator visible at all times during checkout.
The system shall allow users to complete a purchase without creating an account.
Account creation shall be offered only after order confirmation, never as a gate before purchase.
Cart contents shall persist across sessions for a minimum of 30 days using a combination of cookies and server-side storage for authenticated users, and cookies/localStorage for guests.
All form fields shall validate in real time (on blur) and provide immediate, field-level feedback without requiring form submission.
Errors shall be resolved inline without clearing other field values.
The system shall support browser autofill (via correct autocomplete attributes), address lookup via postal code, and pre-population of fields for returning users.
Country shall default to the user's detected locale.

A collapsible order summary (expanded by default on desktop, collapsed by default on mobile) shall be visible on every checkout step, showing item thumbnails, quantities, line prices, subtotal, shipping estimate, taxes, and total.

The system shall surface express checkout options (e.g., Shop Pay, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal) at the top of the checkout flow, before the standard form, on Step 1 (Cart Review) and the Payment step.
inputs: Email address: String, required, RFC 5322 format; real-time duplicate account detection with login prompt
First name: String, required, 1–50 chars, Unicode letters and hyphens
Last name: String, required, 1–50 chars, Unicode letters and hyphens
Phone number: String, optional (required for SMS updates if opted in), E.164 format; locale-aware formatting hint
Shipping address line 1: String, required, 5–100 chars
Shipping address line 2: String, not required, 0–100 chars
City: String, required, 2–50 chars
State/Province: String, required, validated against country-specific subdivision list
Postal/ZIP code: String, required, validated against country-specific format regex
Country: String, required, ISO 3166-1 alpha-2; dropdown
Shipping method selection: Enum, required, derived from available carrier options
Payment method: Enum, required, credit/debit card, express wallets, buy-now-pay-later
Card number: String, required if card, Luhn algorithm check; PAN never stored on application servers
Card expiry: MM/YY, required if card, must be a future date
CVV: String, required if card, 3–4 digits; never logged or stored
Billing address: String, conditional, defaults to 'same as shipping'; full address required if different
Promo/coupon code: String, not required, applied in real time; clear success/failure feedback
Session/authentication token
Cart state (items, quantities, prices) from cart service
Shipping rate quotes from carrier integration
Tax calculation from tax service (address-triggered)
Fraud risk score from fraud detection service
outputs: Order confirmation page displaying: order number, itemized summary, estimated delivery date, shipping address, and payment method (last 4 digits only).
Confirmation email sent within 60 seconds of order placement containing the same information plus a tracking link placeholder.
Order record written to the order management system.
security_constraints: PAN never stored on application servers.
performance_constraints: Confirmation email sent within 60 seconds of order placement.
